title: quercus ilex var. dolichocalyx
intro: Quercus ilex var. dolichocalyx, also known as the evergreen oak, is a variety of the holm oak tree, a type of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to help with wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. dolichocalyx include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial effects, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Quercus ilex var. dolichocalyx include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
